title: Reading and Use of English – Part 3
description: For questions 17–24, read the text below. Use the word given in CAPITALS at the end of some of the lines to form a word that fits in the gap in the same line.

content.text: The (0) POSSIBILITY of living on other planets has fascinated humans for decades. With the (17) of powerful rockets, Mars has become a primary target. Scientists are studying the (18) of the red planet to see if it can support life. One major (19) is the lack of a breathable atmosphere. To overcome this, (20) are looking into terraforming techniques. This (21) goal requires (22) cooperation and vast amounts of funding. Many believe that the (23) of liquid water is a (24) step forward. However, the (25) of astronauts depends on their ability to produce food and oxygen locally. Despite the many (26), the quest to become a multi-planetary species continues to drive innovation and inspire the next generation of explorers to look beyond our own world and reach for the stars.

example.text: The (0) POSSIBILITY (POSSIBLE) of living on other planets...
example.explanation: Noun required after the definite article; POSSIBLE → POSSIBILITY.

questions.explanation: Noun required to describe a state; HABIT → HABITABILITY.
Plural noun for people required; RESEARCH → RESEARCHERS.
Adjective required to modify 'goal'; AMBITION → AMBITIOUS.
Adjective required to modify 'step'; SIGNIFY → SIGNIFICANT.
